shots.speech_text: At Stonebridge, I help keep things running smoothly across North America and Europe. I grew up in Munich — where a handshake still means something. That Bavarian background shapes how I work with our partners.

@1.description: see attached render; modern kitchen interior — empty apartment, no other people, visual only

@2.description: see attached render. MATILDA: relaxed laid-back friendly inviting host; soft gentle warm voice; native Bavarian/Munich accent; conversational — enjoys her work, NOT giggly, NOT laughy, NOT authoritative, NOT intense

shots.speech_text: Stonebridge brings decades of consulting expertise from our U.S. headquarters. We cover supply chain, compliance, and growth strategy. We're expanding across the European Union — and I'm proud to lead from Munich.
